challenges.title: World Cup Final Push
challenges.tagline: The World Cup is on home soil. Every rep is a penalty saved.

challenges.title: Back to School: Report Card
challenges.tagline: Earn your A in pump class. No summer slacking on the transcript.

challenges.title: Stein Hoist September
challenges.tagline: Oktoberfest arm insurance. 10,000 together before the first Maß.

challenges.title: Pump-kin Spice
challenges.tagline: No tricks, all pecs. 666 reps before the witching hour.

challenges.title: The 180 Club
challenges.tagline: One week, 180 reps — a perfect checkout. Dart tournament rules: lose a leg, owe ten.

challenges.title: Earn Your Bird
challenges.tagline: Ends Thanksgiving. Every rep is a guilt-free bite of stuffing.

challenges.title: Spoetzl Sprint
challenges.tagline: 1,909 together before the Shiner pilgrimage — the year Cosmo fired up the brewery. Prost.

challenges.title: Turkey Trot Day
challenges.tagline: Flash challenge: 100 reps on Thanksgiving Day. Phil has a podium to defend.

challenges.title: 12 Days of Fitmas
challenges.tagline: Survive the holidays. Twelve straight days, no excuses under the tree.

challenges.title: Every Damn Day January
challenges.tagline: The resolution flagship. 31 days, zero misses. Who actually shows up?

challenges.title: Buck the Floor
challenges.tagline: Rodeo Run training season through the last day of RodeoHouston. 8 seconds is a ride, 8 pushups is a warmup.

challenges.title: Super Bowl Sunday
challenges.tagline: Flash challenge: 200 reps between kickoff and the final whistle. Halftime show optional, pushups aren't.

challenges.title: Mudbug Madness
challenges.tagline: Crawfish season, baby. Peel. Pinch. Push. Earn your spot at the boil.

challenges.title: 420: Go Low to Get High
challenges.tagline: Exactly 420 reps. Ends 4/20. Blaze through it.

challenges.title: Memorial May Murph-ish
challenges.tagline: Honor the fallen the hard way. 900 reps across May.

challenges.title: Make Pterodactyls Fly
challenges.tagline: 5,000 combined reps — enough collective thrust for takeoff.

challenges.title: The 1776 Club
challenges.tagline: Texas-sized America challenge. 1,776 reps. Hardcore tier. God bless.
